title: House roast coffee beans
summary: A balanced whole-bean roast prepared for guests who want the cafe flavor at home.
details: Our house roast is built around a smooth cup profile with cocoa sweetness, gentle acidity, and a clean finish that works well for espresso or filter brewing.
It is intended as a practical retail product for regular guests, gift shoppers, and anyone who wants a familiar everyday coffee between visits.
highlights: Whole bean format for fresher grinding
Comfortable profile for espresso and filter
Useful as a small branded gift

title: Branded ceramic cup
summary: A simple everyday cup for guests who want a small branded item from their favorite place.
details: The ceramic cup works well for coffee, tea, cocoa, or home office use. It is designed as a practical souvenir rather than a decoration-only product.
This item is easy to sell at reception, near the bar, or as part of a small gift set with coffee, dessert, or a certificate.
highlights: Comfortable size for daily drinks
Good souvenir for regular guests
Can be packed as part of a gift set

title: Branded cotton T-shirt
summary: A casual branded T-shirt for staff style, loyal guests, events, and local merch shelves.
details: A soft cotton T-shirt can be used as staff merch, event merch, or a small retail product for guests who like the brand atmosphere.
It works best with a clean logo, simple typography, and neutral colors that people can actually wear outside the venue.
highlights: Useful for staff and guest merch
Simple design for everyday wear
Good option for events and giveaways

title: Housemade berry liqueur
summary: A small-batch berry liqueur prepared as a signature house product for adult guests where available.
details: This housemade liqueur is built around berry flavor, gentle sweetness, and a smooth finish. It can be served after dinner or offered as a bottled gift product where local rules allow.
Availability, bottle size, and purchase conditions may depend on licensing, season, and venue policy. Please confirm details directly with the team.
highlights: Signature housemade flavor
Suitable as an adult gift product
Availability depends on local rules

title: Housemade herbal infusion
summary: A fragrant housemade infusion with herbs, citrus, or spices for guests who enjoy signature drinks.
details: The infusion can be prepared with seasonal herbs, citrus peel, spices, or local ingredients depending on the concept of the venue.
It can work as a small bottled product, a restaurant digestif, or a gift item for guests who want something more personal than standard retail goods.
highlights: Seasonal house recipe
Good for gift shelves and dinner service
Can be adapted to the venue style

title: Signature dessert box
summary: A takeaway dessert box with selected sweets for gifts, family visits, or coffee time at home.
details: The dessert box can include mini cakes, cookies, pastries, or seasonal sweets packed for easy takeaway.
It is a practical product for cafes, restaurants, and hotel lobbies because guests can buy it after a meal or order it for a small occasion.
highlights: Good for takeaway and gifts
Can include seasonal desserts
Easy to sell with coffee or tea

title: Housemade jam
summary: A small jar of seasonal jam prepared for breakfasts, gifts, and home use.
details: Housemade jam can be prepared from berries, apples, plums, apricots, or other seasonal fruit depending on the kitchen concept.
It works well as a breakfast product, a small souvenir, or a simple add-on near reception or the cafe counter.
highlights: Seasonal fruit base
Useful for breakfast and gifts
Small format for easy retail sale

title: Signature sauce bottle
summary: A bottled house sauce for guests who want to take a familiar restaurant flavor home.
details: A signature sauce can be based on herbs, tomatoes, peppers, honey mustard, barbecue flavor, or another house recipe.
It is a strong retail product when guests already know the sauce from the menu and want to use it at home.
highlights: Based on a house recipe
Works well with grilled or main dishes
Easy add-on for regular guests

title: Gift certificate
summary: A flexible gift option for dinners, hotel stays, spa time, coffee visits, or private celebrations.
details: A gift certificate is useful when guests want to give an experience instead of a physical product.
It can be prepared for a fixed amount or a specific service, depending on the business rules and available offers.
highlights: Works for restaurant, hotel, or spa services
Easy gift for birthdays and holidays
Can be issued for different amounts

title: Branded tote bag
summary: A reusable branded bag for takeaway orders, gifts, coffee beans, and daily use.
details: A tote bag is a practical merch item because guests can use it after leaving the venue.
It can be sold alone or packed with coffee beans, jam, a dessert box, or a gift certificate.
highlights: Reusable and practical
Good for gift packaging
Works for cafes, hotels, and restaurants
